items.title: Bruins (38) gaat bij Katwijk debuteren als trainer in de Tweede Divisie
items.summary: Luigi Bruins staat vanaf volgend seizoen langs de lijn in de Tweede Divisie. De 38-jarige trainer veruilt VV Zwaluwen voor VV Katwijk, waar hij de opvolger wordt van Klaas Wels.

items.title: Rodman coaxes dance from Hayes in USWNT rout
items.summary: Trinity Rodman capped off the USWNT's 5-0 rout of Chile by persuading coach Emma Hayes into a sideline dance, as a young American squad secured its fifth consecutive shutout on Tuesday night.

items.title: Abraham joins Villa 1 day after Besiktas transfer
items.summary: Tammy Abraham has signed for Aston Villa from Besiktas just one day after he joined the Turkish club a permanent transfer from Roma.

items.title: Arteta: Arsenal had 'beautiful' meeting after loss
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has revealed he called his players for a meeting to "bring down the temperature" in the wake of their defeat to Manchester United.

items.title: The Premier League stars who could still move this transfer window
items.summary: There is less than a week to go in the January transfer window. Here are the Premier League players who still need a move away this month.

items.title: As 'managers' disappear from the Premier League, are clubs better off?
items.summary: Premier League clubs are corporations that have outgrown the "manager" role that legendary clubs once had. Why?

items.title: 'Xabi Alonso zwaar onbeschoft naar Arne Slot'
items.summary: Hans Kraay Junior. Van speler, tot amateurtrainer, tot ESPN-analyticus. Altijd op de hoogte van de laatste ontwikkelingen, met immer een uitgesproken mening, neemt hij wekelijks in zijn column de actualiteit door met beurtelings VI’s Freek Jansen en Martijn Krabbendam.

items.title: Rosenior geeft duidelijk signaal af na vermeende interesse Man Utd in Palmer
items.summary: Deze week dook het gerucht op dat Manchester United aan de komst van Cole Palmer denkt. In aanloop naar het Champions League-duel met Napoli benadrukte Chelsea-manager Liam Rosenior dat Palmer gewoon op Stamford Bridge blijft. 'Er komt een nieuwe manager en dan zouden er ineens spelers ongelukkig zijn. Onzin.'

items.title: VI Live: PSV lijkt te moeten stunten thuis tegen Bayern München
items.summary: PSV speelt woensdagavond om 21.00 uur in eigen huis tegen Bayern München in de Champions League. Het lijkt er sterk op dat de huidige acht punten van de Eindhovenaren niet genoeg zijn voor een plek in de tussenronde, waardoor PSV een stunt nodig heeft. Of dat lukt, volg je in deze VI Live.

items.title: VI Live: Ajax moet winnen van Olympiakos en hopen op een klein wonder
items.summary: Ajax neemt het woensdagavond om 21.00 uur op tegen Olympiakos Piraeus in de Champions League. De Amsterdammers moeten zelf winnen om nog kans te maken op een plek in de tussenronde. Daarnaast zijn zij afhankelijk van de concurrentie . Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in deze VI Live.

items.title: Why are Paris St-Germain struggling to hit top form?
items.summary: European champions PSG face Newcastle in the Champions League on Wednesday - but why have Luis Enrique's side not been at their best so far this term?

items.summary: Former England all-rounder Moeen Ali has joined Yorkshire for the 2026 Vitality Blast after reversing his decision to retire from county cricket.

items.title: Two fans in hospital as Chelsea urge caution after Naples 'incident'
items.summary: Travelling Chelsea fans in Naples for Wednesday's Champions League game are told to "exercise extreme caution" after two supporters suffer injuries.

items.title: Saudi Pro League lining up ambitious move for Ballon d'Or winner Dembele
items.summary: The Saudi Pro League is laying the groundwork for an ambitious summer move for Ballon d'Or winner Ousmane Dembele.

items.title: Premier League has the power but still faces reckoning with European giants | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: English clubs stroll through Champions League group phase but fatigue tends to take its toll by the spring Has there been a great game in the Champions League group stage this season? Probably not. Even if there had been, it almost certainly didn’t mean all that much. But that’s the way of the modern game: an extremely protracted clearing of the throat before the real business begins. Uefa will proudly tell the world that only six teams have nothing to play for in the final round of games on Wednesday, but whether it was worth 126 games to get to the mild peril of Napoli or Club Brugge possibly going out, or the questionable thrill of finding out whether Tottenham or Atalanta will have to endure the playoff round, is debatable. Continue reading...

items.title: Villa sign striker Abraham for £18.25m
items.summary: England striker Tammy Abraham completes an £18.25m return to Aston Villa from Turkish side Besiktas.

items.title: Arne Slot says PSG European exit helped Liverpool win Premier League
items.summary: Manager wants players ‘to improve in both boxes’ Liverpool without Konaté and Gomez against Qarabag Arne Slot has said an early Champions League exit may have contributed to Liverpool winning the Premier League title last year but said his team must improve in both boxes to secure silverware this season. Slot has faced renewed criticism after his side’s 13-game unbeaten run ended at Bournemouth on Saturday, leaving the reigning champions sixth in the Premier League. Continue reading...
